site.name: The Arabic Market
site.heroDesc: Sudanese streetwear rooted in identity. Two collections that tell our story — from the streets to the world.
site.storyTitle:
Built from
Khartoum to
the World.
site.storyP1: The Arabic Market is a Sudanese youth brand that bridges street culture with heritage. Every design carries a piece of who we are — from the calligraphy on our caps to the rickshaw on our tees.
site.storyP2: We don't just make clothes. We tell stories. Our two collections — Republic of Sudan and The Mad Scientist — represent the duality of our culture: pride and play, tradition and chaos, roots and dreams.
site.newsletterDesc: New drops, restocks, and exclusive early access.

collections.name: Republic of Sudan
collections.desc: Bold identity pieces inspired by Sudanese heritage. Minimal design, maximum statement. Every piece carries the spirit of home.

collections.name: The Mad Scientist
collections.desc: Playful isometric illustrations celebrating Sudanese street culture. The rickshaw, the coffee lady — deconstructed and reimagined by a mad genius.

products.name: Sudan Statement Hoodie
products.desc: Premium heavyweight hoodie featuring embroidered 'Republic of Sudan' typography. Oversized fit, brushed fleece interior.

products.name: Heritage Emblem Cap
products.desc: Washed cotton dad cap with embroidered eagle emblem. Adjustable brass buckle closure.

products.name: Republic Tee
products.desc: Oversized heavyweight tee with back print Arabic script. 100% cotton, pre-shrunk.

products.name: Heritage Ice Cap
products.desc: Ribbed knit ice cap in rust orange. Embroidered logo tag. Soft acrylic blend.

products.name: Rickshaw Tee
products.desc: Oversize tee with isometric coffee lady illustration on front and exploded-view blueprint on back. 100% cotton.

products.name: Caffein Beat
products.desc: Oversize tee featuring the iconic Sudanese coffee lady reimagined in isometric style. 100% cotton.
